com.nexacro.java.xapi.data.datatype

Class SqlDataType

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.nexacro.java.xapi.data.datatype.SqlDataType

  • public class SqlDataType
extends java.lang.Object

    decide SQL data type. Decide relation between data type to allow transformation to other DataType compatible by DataTypeFactory.

    Author:
    dhrim
    See Also:
    DataType, JavaDataType, PlatformDataType
